summary: End-to-end testing of MMXM Crypto Screener (backend + frontend) completed successfully. 13/13 backend pytest tests pass (after retry for one intermittent 502 from preview gateway). Full frontend dashboard renders correctly with live data; all interactive controls work; live Telegram message sent.

minor.issue: Took ~30s consistently and once returned 502 from the preview gateway during pytest run; succeeded on retry. Backend itself returns 200 in <35s. Consider lowering TOP_N during interactive scans or returning 202+poll if gateway timeouts recur.

issues: Individual tickers don't expose data-testid (e.g., ticker-BTC). Visual rendering is fine; only affects automated test selectors.

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid="ticker-<SYMBOL>" on MarketStrip ticker items for easier automated coverage.
(Optional) Investigate intermittent 502 on /api/scan/run via preview gateway when scan duration is ~30s near edge of ingress timeout.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: load_dotenv after imports of services is fine because services rely on env at runtime, not import time — verified working.
All MongoDB queries already exclude _id via projection {'_id': 0} — good.
/api/scan/run is synchronous (blocks request thread until full scan completes ~30s). Consider returning 202 immediately and polling /api/scan/runs to avoid gateway timeouts.
CMC endpoint accepts comma-separated symbols but doesn't validate length/whitelist — minor abuse vector if exposed publicly.
Frontend Dashboard.jsx uses native window.alert() for Telegram test result — replacing with toast (use-toast already present) would be more polished.
seed_data_creation: None created. Existing CHIPUSDT short (screener) signal from prior scan was used for verification. A real Telegram message was sent to chat 8733178489 by the test_telegram_test_send case.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL: https://face-motion-maker-1.preview.emergentagent.com (from frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). All 11 acceptance API endpoints verified. Scanner runs every 5 min; dedupe key 4h. CHIPUSDT short was created during pre-test by background scanner; only 1 signal in DB at test time. Backtest with 0 MMXM signals returns total=0 wins=0 losses=0 win_rate=0.0 — that's correct behavior, not a bug.
